title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Voltas

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Voltas
jsonLd.description:
We at Voltas are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Voltas:
Voltas is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voltas!
